description:
Offered: Fall
In this capstone course, students will collaborate with one another, a faculty member, and a community partner to plan a final, community-engaged capstone project that will be completed in a subsequent semester. Cross-listed with ENGL 4799
Prerequisite(s): Completion of all other Digital Media Innovation major requirements.
Note: Credit can only be awarded for one of COMM 4799 or DMI 4799 or ENGL 4799. This course is restricted to students in the Digital Media Innovation program.
prerequisites: Completion of all other Digital Media Innovation major requirements.
